honest_limitations: All 210 cases are outcome_code=9 (UNRESOLVED) — truly prospective, 100% purity.
Some FRAUD verdicts are based on claim patterns (e.g., '100% accuracy', 'guaranteed returns') without confirmation of actual fraud — these are SCP's prospective predictions.
Sample includes both specific real cases (with URLs) and pattern-based representative cases (where URL points to a related source but claim is paraphrased).
Web search results may include cases slightly outside strict 2025-Q4 to 2026-Q2 window.
SCP verdicts hand-simulated by applying trigger rules; real SCP implementation may differ.
10% manual audit (21 cases) would need to be performed to validate source authenticity.
Some cases are similar to each other (e.g., multiple AI lab AGI claims) — not fully independent.
Domain balance: AI claims 60, papers 50, startups 50, medical 50. AI is over-represented.
audit_commitment: Results published regardless of outcome. No selective reporting. All metrics reported. Limitations acknowledged honestly.
next_steps: Track v4's 210 cases for 6-12 months per Phase 4 protocol
At 2027-06-22, compute v4 metrics with full statistical power
10% manual audit (21 cases) to be performed at 6-month evaluation
If v4 shows recall >=40% and precision >=80%, SCP validated prospectively
If v4 shows recall <20% or precision <60%, SCP fails prospectively
